Variabilis 2.4mm Multi-Angle Distal Radial Plate (2 holes, 45mm, Width 22mm, Left)

Variabilis Multi-Angle Plate System · Distal Radial Plates

Variabilis 2.4mm LPS Multi-angle Double-Column Distal Radial Plate, Volar - 2 holes, 45mm, Width 22mm, Left. Multi-angle locking technology with 0-15 degree screw angulation. Anatomical fit with rounded edges and polished surface.

MaterialTitanium Alloy (Ti-6Al-7Nb)
WhatsApp Quote
Frequently Asked Questions

Variabilis 2.4mm LPS Multi-angle Double-Column Distal Radial Plate, Volar - 2 holes, 45mm, Width 22mm, Left. Multi-angle locking technology with 0-15 degree screw angulation. Anatomical fit with rounded edges and polished surface.

This product is manufactured by Meril and is distributed by Agile Healthcare across all districts of Telangana.

Yes, all Meril Life Sciences products distributed by Agile Healthcare, including the Variabilis 2.4mm Multi-Angle Distal Radial Plate (2 holes, 45mm, Width 22mm, Left), strictly adhere to CDSCO guidelines and ISO 13485:2016 quality standards.

The Variabilis 2.4mm Multi-Angle Distal Radial Plate (2 holes, 45mm, Width 22mm, Left) is constructed using Titanium Alloy (Ti-6Al-7Nb), ensuring high biocompatibility and durability.
